title: Junior Business Development Manager at PropTiger

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at PropTiger
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? PropTiger in Madurai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About PropTiger:
PropTiger is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PropTiger!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
